privileged_info_summary: The task requires refactoring a synthetic composite requirement at ID 6 within a ReqView project's 'documents/SRS.json'. The original text states that the system shall encrypt local data using AES-256 and transmit data using TLS 1.3. A correct refactor involves modifying SRS-6 to only contain the encryption clause while explicitly removing 'transmit', and adding a new adjacent requirement with the transmission clause that explicitly omits 'AES-256'.
